scenarios.title: Repo-grounded context artifact
scenarios.purpose: Check whether the skill can inspect repo evidence, narrow ambiguity, and create a useful docs-only context artifact without drifting into implementation planning.
successChecklist: A new docs artifact exists at docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-contract-context.md.
The artifact is grounded in repo evidence rather than generic advice.
The final answer ends with a short Common Understanding summary.
scenarios.prompt: Use the local Codex skill "clarify". Review the current clarify skill and its references, then create a docs-only artifact at docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-contract-context.md that captures the current shared understanding of what this skill is for, what its required output is, and when it should create optional docs artifacts. End with a short Common Understanding summary in your final answer. Do not edit source files outside the new docs artifact.
scenarios.finalMessagePreview:
Created [docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-contract-context.md](/var/folders/t9/zddpblm14zv__zdqy7m726b00000gn/T/plugin-eval-repo-context-doc-UYOwtP/workspace/docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-contract-context.md) from the `clarify` skill and its references, and left all source files untouched.

**Common Understanding**
- Agreed: `clarify` reduces ambiguity before planning or implementation, always ends with `Common Understanding`, and only creates durable docs under `docs/` when the user asks for one.
- Open: none identified.
- Next: use the new context doc as the shared baseline for future `clarify` work.

scenarios.title: Minimal-question clarification summary
scenarios.purpose: Measure whether the skill can stay lightweight, inspect first, and produce a crisp Common Understanding when the request is underspecified but partially answerable from repo context.
successChecklist: A concise docs artifact exists at docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-doc-routing-context.md.
The result stays in clarification territory and does not become an execution plan.
The output distinguishes agreed context from remaining open questions.
scenarios.prompt: Use the local Codex skill "clarify". I want to improve this skill's docs artifact behavior, but I do not want implementation planning. Inspect the repo first, then write a short note at docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-doc-routing-context.md that states what is agreed, what is still open, and what the next durable doc should be if a user asks for an unspecified artifact. Keep it concise and do not create any plan file.
scenarios.finalMessagePreview:
I inspected `skills/clarify/SKILL.md` and its routing references first, then wrote the note at [/private/var/folders/t9/zddpblm14zv__zdqy7m726b00000gn/T/plugin-eval-standard-mode-common-understanding-00xWXS/workspace/docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-doc-routing-context.md](/private/var/folders/t9/zddpblm14zv__zdqy7m726b00000gn/T/plugin-eval-standard-mode-common-understanding-00xWXS/workspace/docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-doc-routing-context.md).

It captures:
- Agreed: `clarify` only writes durable docs when asked, and unspecified artifacts route to a context doc unless a stronger canonical family exists.
- Open: which topic-specific doc families, if any, should override that default in this repo.
- Next: for an unspecified artifact, create the topic context doc under `docs/artifacts/contexts/`, not a plan file.

No plan file was created.

scenarios.title: Boundary narrowing on implementation-like ask
scenarios.purpose: Check whether the skill narrows the request honestly when the ask starts to look like implementation instead of clarification.
successChecklist: The run narrows the task to clarification instead of drifting into implementation.
Any edits stay aligned with the justified clarification-only scope.
scenarios.prompt: This task is only a partial match for the local Codex skill "clarify". I am tempted to jump into implementing a larger rewrite of the clarify skill, but first I want only the clarification slice. Inspect the repo and create docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-boundary-context.md that says what is already decided, what still needs clarification before implementation, and what the next artifact should be. Do not edit SKILL.md or any source files.
scenarios.finalMessagePreview:
Created [docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-boundary-context.md](/var/folders/t9/zddpblm14zv__zdqy7m726b00000gn/T/plugin-eval-boundary-narrowing-WnFuAq/workspace/docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-boundary-context.md).

It captures:
- Already decided: `clarify` stays pre-implementation, keeps the `standard`/`grill` split, ends with `Common Understanding`, and uses `docs/` for durable artifacts.
- Still needs clarification: exact rewrite scope, whether this is wording vs behavior vs contract change, whether the mode/question boundaries change, and what downstream docs need updates.
- Next artifact: a formal implementation plan under `docs/exec-plans/active/` once those scope questions are settled.

I didn’t edit `SKILL.md` or any source files.

nextSteps: Analyze the observed usage with: plugin-eval analyze ~/Code/ai-tools/skills/clarify --observed-usage ~/Code/ai-tools/skills/clarify/.plugin-eval/benchmark-usage.jsonl --format markdown
Review the measurement plan with: plugin-eval measurement-plan ~/Code/ai-tools/skills/clarify --observed-usage ~/Code/ai-tools/skills/clarify/.plugin-eval/benchmark-usage.jsonl --format markdown
